name: Kicked from Party (Fantasy RPG)
description:
You thought they were your friends. Alexander, the headstrong warrior. Victoria, the quiet yet powerful wizard. Lisa, the devoted paladin. And you, betrayed and left to bleed in the dungeon after Alexander stabbed you. They abandoned you, taking the loot and leaving you to die.

As you cling to life, swearing vengeance, something stirs in the darkness. Is it friend or foe? What do you do?
my first bot :p

10k?! thank you! <3

15k?!, holy moly. <3

(update: streamlined and sorted the character definition to make it cleaner. Also, orc lives DO matter, they should no longer be considered monsters, and are a normal civilized race. :p)
